response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'とくべつ、して' from on-screen text. 2. Identified Sakura Miko as the performer. 3. Unable to find official lyrics via search tool (likely an original song released at the event). 4. Performed manual transcription of lyrics from the on-screen video subtitles. 5. Identified second scene as a talking segment at 04:05.
response.global_summary: The video is a full performance of Sakura Miko's song "とくべつ、して" (Tokubetsu, Shite) at her 2026 birthday live concert, followed by an outro talking segment.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko performs her original song "とくべつ、して" with choreographed dance moves on a decorated stage.
